ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB ID of the protein structure */,
  "structure_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the protein structure (e.g., X-ray crystallography, NMR spectroscopy) */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the protein structure in Angstroms */,
  "chain_count" INTEGER /* Number of chains in the protein structure */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* The name of the protein */,
  "organism" TEXT /* The organism from which the protein is derived */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* The date when the protein structure was published */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* The molecular weight of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the mutation belongs to */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., point mutation, insertion, deletion) */,
  "mutation_site" TEXT /* Site of the mutation */,
  "mutation_residue" TEXT /* Residue involved in the mutation */,
  "effect_on_function" TEXT /* The effect of the mutation on protein function */,
  "effect_on_stability" TEXT /* The effect of the mutation on protein stability */,
  "mutation_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_mutation_type FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_type") REFERENCES mutation_types ("mutation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_results" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the prediction belongs to */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation the prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the prediction (e.g., mcsm_ppi2, molecular dynamics) */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction (e.g., free energy change) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* The confidence score of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* The date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_status" TEXT /* The status of the prediction (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_results_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_results_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_results_prediction_method FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_method") REFERENCES prediction_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_folds" (
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling fold */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction the fold belongs to */,
  "fold_value" INTEGER /* Value of the sampling fold */,
  "fold_description" TEXT /* A description of the sampling fold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_folds_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES prediction_results ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prediction method */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* The version of the prediction method */,
  "method_accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the prediction method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* The institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* The session ID of the user's access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein structure */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the structure belongs to */,
  "structure_data" TEXT /* The 3D structure data of the protein */,
  "structure_format" TEXT /* The format of the 3D structure data (e.g., PDB, mmCIF) */,
  "structure_source" TEXT /* The source of the 3D structure data (e.g., X-ray crystallography, NMR spectroscopy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_structures_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_types" (
  "mutation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation type */,
  "mutation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation type */,
  "impact" TEXT /* The impact of the mutation type (e.g., neutral, deleterious) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* The version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* The size of the dataset in terms of the number of entries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_datasets_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES prediction_results ("prediction_id")
)
